answers.where: compact low-poly city block with package route, guard pursuit, red roadblock marker, car, buildings, NPCs and HUD
answers.action: after package pickup, react to the guard roadblock by stunning the guard with toy blaster or driving around
answers.response: WANTED rises, red roadblock marker appears, and toy blaster clears the roadblock/stuns the guard
answers.reward: route can still recover to package delivery, cash reward, and next-job lock
answers.game_look: low-poly Roblox-like toy city prototype with readable NPC pressure, vehicle controls, mission pads and HUD

issues.text: The pressure beat is readable, but the city and NPC system remain first-prototype simple.

not_covered.reason: progression is HUD cash plus next-job-lock in this pursuit slice; no separate panel yet
retry text is toast-only; no separate restart screen yet

problem: Pass for pursuit slice: NPC pressure now escalates with a visible roadblock and player response clears it; remaining debt is prototype-simple city/pursuit depth.
next: Next narrow slice can add a second street job or a small story/mission intro.
